title: Late for Work
content: Sophia opened her eyes and looked at the clock. It was already 8:15. She jumped out of bed quickly because she needed to be at work at 8:30. She brushed her teeth, put on her clothes, and grabbed a banana for breakfast. Outside, the streets were busy and noisy. Sophia ran to the bus stop, but the bus left just before she arrived. She sighed deeply and called her manager. Luckily, he was understanding. Sophia promised herself she would set two alarms tomorrow.
